title: View file in Kanban and Gallery Public Views
excerpt: Currently, files like pdfs can be set as the “Cover” and thus show an image when logged in. I would like that same image to show in the public views. Ideally, I would like to be able to set attachments to “public” so the…

posts.author: Colette (Colette Williams)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, files like pdfs can be set as the “Cover” and thus show an image when logged in. I would like that same image to show in the public views. Ideally, I would like to be able to set attachments to “public” so they can be accessed without being logged in.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Colette,

Would you be happy to elaborate a little further on your request here? Are you interested in having the file preview in publicly shared boards and views? Thanks!

posts.author: Colette (Colette Williams)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca!

Yes, I would like the cover to show if I set the documents to public or change a setting on the board to show them. Ideally, it would be great if the pdfs and other files were publicly accessible if I set them to be as well.

Thank you,

Colette
